pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)Siren Head: Reborn centers on a towering horror creature that feels huge, unnatural, and impossible to ignore.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Its size alone changes the mood. It feels less like a mob and more like a walking disaster.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)Its horror comes from scale, silhouette, and the feeling that the player is far too small to matter.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)It creates fear by being visible, huge, and deeply wrong.
